role: Editor; publisher; owner of Ebtekar publishing house; assassinated 1997
bio: Ebrahim Zalzadeh was the editor of the literary magazine *Me'yar* and owner of Ebtekar publishing house. On 24 February 1997, he was arrested by agents of the [Ministry of Intelligence](/orgs/ministry-of-intelligence). His body was found half-buried outside Tehran on 29 March 1997. His murder was part of the [chain murders](/events/chain-murders-iran-1998) campaign targeting Iranian intellectuals and publishers.
editorial_notes: Editor of Me'yar magazine, owner of Ebtekar publishing house. Arrested 24 February 1997 by MOIS, body found 29 March 1997.
